name: Chicago O’Hare International Airport (ORD)
content:
ORD is a cozy airport despite its size, or maybe I have simply convinced myself that I like it because of how often I fly though it. The airport has a dinosaur. You should take a picture with the dinosaur. There was one time I saw a guy set up a hammock in one of the terminals, and I am honestly rather jealous of his idea. If you have more than three or four hours between your flights, you have enough time to leave the airport to grab lunch and make it back on time.
One feature I have strong feelings about is the tunnel connecting the B and C gate blocks of Terminal 1, which I have named the Pantone Tunnel since the walls look like the house paint color swatches you can get at hardware stores. The original Pantone Tunnel music annoyed me to no end, until they one day changed it, sometime in late 2023 or early 2024. I now find the Pantone Tunnel a very relaxing experience, and I presently enjoy my journeys through Terminal 1.
